name: Lemony Cheesecake with Fresh Fruit
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Fat free cream cheese (NOT product in tub)
1 can Eagle Brand Fat Free or Low-Fat Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees F.
2. Spray bottom of 8-inch springform pan with cooking spray; sprinkle crumbs on bottom of pan.
3. In a mixer bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually beat in Eagle Brand milk until smooth.
5. Add egg whites, egg, lemon juice, and vanilla; mix well.
6. Stir in flour.
7. Pour mixture into prepared pan.
8. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until center is set.
9. Cool. Chill.
10. Serve with fruit. Refrigerate leftovers.
